articles.title: Beyond Capital: Powering SME Growth in 2025 with JK Capital Financing Solutions

articles.excerpt: The Philippines recorded its fastest growth in the second quarter of 2025, led by a rebound in the agriculture sector, which grew 7%, up from 2.2% in the previous quarter.

articles.title: Bridging Payment Gaps: Invoice Financing as a Tool for Business Continuity
articles.author: admin
articles.excerpt: For SMEs, the biggest threat isn’t losing customers, it’s waiting to get paid. A business can deliver on a million-peso project, yet still find itself scrambling for payroll, supplier payments, or rent because clients settle invoices 30, 60, 90, or even 120 days later.

articles.title: Daddy’s Best Nature Farm Scales Agriculture Operations With JK Capital Finance
articles.author: admin
articles.excerpt: Daddy’s Best Nature Farm is revolutionizing sustainable farming practices in the Philippines. Set on a lush 17-hectare property in San Clemente, Tarlac, the farm marries regenerative agricultural techniques with a strong commitment to social impact.
